features: GIFT BAG: Our stylish bottle bag is not only functional for a range of products but presentable for any occasion too. With a golden design it can turn any bottled gift into a thoughtful gesture, making it ideal for a birthday, anniversary and more.

BOTTLE BAG: This bottle bag from Hallmark is the perfect choice for any occasion including Mother's Day, a birthday and more. This bag features a heart design on the sides and comes complete with a co-ordinating white grosgrain ribbon handles.

HEART GIFT TAG: This bottle gift bag comes complete with a co-ordinating heart-shaped gift tag with metallic gold foil details. The tag provides enough space for you to write your own personal message and wish, adding that special touch to your gift.

HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This product is made using material from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources. To recycle this bag, remove the handles and tag and recycle with card and paper materials, please ensure non-paper material is disposed of separately.

BOTTLE BAG SIZE: This gift bag measures 32.7cm by 13.3cm by 8.2cm and is the perfect accessory to deliver a special gin, their favourite bottle of fizz, a whiskey and more. Make their celebration one to remember no matter the occasion.
